site.title: Cafe Pibatie | Artisanal Coffee & Fusion Cuisine
site.description: Cafe Pibatie - Mumbai's premium coffee destination. Specialty coffee, fusion cuisine, and artisanal drinks. Visit us at Borivali West or Oshiwara, Andheri West.

hero.title: Where Morning Rituals Begin
hero.subtitle: Specialty coffee. Fusion flavors. Your daily escape.

story.label: The Pibatie Way
story.heading:
Crafted for the
Curious Palate
paragraphs: We don't just serve coffee. We curate moments — from the first sip of our signature espresso to the last bite of our chef's seasonal creation.
Every cup is a conversation between beans and craft. Every dish, a story told through flavors that bridge continents.

ambiance.label: The Experience
ambiance.heading:
Spaces Designed
for Moments
ambiance.description: Whether you're catching up with friends, working remotely, or simply escaping the city's rush — our spaces are crafted for you.

Shop 1, Avanti B Apartments
Haridas Nagar, Shimpoli Road
Mumbai 400092

locations.name: Oshiwara, Andheri West

Shop 2/002, Ground Floor
Anushka CHS, Ward K/W
Oshiwara, Mumbai

cta.title: Book a Table in Andheri
cta.text: Walk in, or book ahead. Either way, we'll save you the best seat.

reviews.text: The staff was very nice, food was amazing, would 10/10 recommend you to blindly order anything which sounds nice because everything is super tastyyyyy especially the classic tiramisu dessert
reviews.author: Ishani Joshi

reviews.text: Good food, nice ambiance. Great place to chill out with friends.
reviews.author: Vishal Shetty

reviews.text: Staff was very warm and welcoming... we lovedcha pesto nanzaa... it was too delicious... ambience was very good... must visit!
reviews.author: Divya Purohit

reviews.text: Simple, Sober, Good Vibes, Best taste. Overall worth visiting. Average 500-600 per person.
reviews.author: Naresh M. Pathak

reviews.text: The Matcha Mango and Irish cream mocha was delicious. The place has the sweetest staff. Nice and chill cafe.
reviews.author: Reena Turner

reviews.text: Menu is pretty diverse, ambience is amazing. It's so budget friendly.
reviews.author: Saloni Ghadi

reviews.text: Good Food Good Vibes! Took myself on a solo date and had a wonderful time. The place has the sweetest staff.
reviews.author: Hasti Desai

reviews.text: The café has a cozy and pleasant vibe. The coffee tastes great, and the staff is friendly. Perfect place to relax.
reviews.author: Janhavi Vetkar

reviews.text: Very nice ambience and the food also tasted amazing… Good little evening snack place with your friends or partner
reviews.author: Meet Gala

reviews.text: Sweetest staff and incredible matcha! 10/10 recommend!
reviews.author: Erika Nicole Vaz

reviews.text: The food and the vibe is amazing. The service is fantastic. You must try the Lotus Milk Cake... unmissable!
reviews.author: Harssh A Singh

reviews.text: I have visited Cafe Pibatie multiple times and it has consistently been a great experience. The ambience is pleasant and the food & beverages are excellent.
reviews.author: Srija Ghosh

reviews.text: Love the food out here... always satisfied. Great place to visit with friends and family.
reviews.author: Riddhi Vahi

reviews.text: Food is good. Service was little slow. But for good food its okay. I love raw papaya mango salad
reviews.author: Akassh Kumarr Arya

reviews.text: The cafe has got a cozy vibe and really stands out as a go to cute date place.
reviews.author: Karan Sharma

reviews.text: Food was delicious, and the ambiance was good.
reviews.author: Varsha Yadav

whatsappChat.greeting: Hi! How can we help you?

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to enhance your experience. By continuing to visit this site you agree to our use of cookies.

faqs.question: What are your operating hours?
faqs.answer: We are open from 10:30am to 11:30pm at Borivali and 10:00am to 11:00pm at Andheri.

faqs.question: Do you offer delivery?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can order through Zomato or Swiggy.

faqs.question: Is the cafe pet-friendly?
faqs.answer: Yes! We welcome your furry friends in our outdoor seating area.
